text: Claim credit for the 2026 Annual Meeting until December 31. Claim Credit for 2026 AAAAI Annual Meeting Click on the arrows on the right and left (when hovering) to look through the photos. Thank you to all who attended the Annual Meeting in Philadelphia, PA. Stay tuned for more information on the 2027 AAAAI Annual Meeting, February 19–22 in New Orleans, LA.
source: AAAI (American Academy of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology) Annual Meeting

text: Get Actionable Education for Your Practice at the 2026 AAAAI Practice Management Course Whether you’re early in your career or leading an established practice, this course provides actionable strategies you can take back and apply immediately. Join us for the 2026 AAAAI Practice Management Course, held during the AAAAI Annual Meeting on Friday, February 27.
source: AAAI (American Academy of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology) Annual Meeting

text: Expert speakers will cover topics including RVUs, coding and billing, cybersecurity and much more. Discovery 2026: New Mechanisms of Type 2 Immunity, is the third annual three-day conference that specifically features cutting-edge basic science research. Discovery runs alongside the 2026 AAAAI Annual Meeting, taking place in Philadelphia, PA, from February 26-28.
source: AAAI (American Academy of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology) Annual Meeting

text: We Look Forward To Seeing You in Philadelphia, PA! AAAAI President Frank S. Virant, MD, FAAAAI, and Annual Meeting Program Committee Chair, Julie Wang, MD, FAAAAI, are excited to welcome you to Philadelphia, PA, for the 2026 AAAAI Annual Meeting.
source: AAAI (American Academy of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology) Annual Meeting

text: See what they have in store for you! Presidential Plenary: Generative & Agentic Artificial Intelligence (AI) in Clinical Medicine: A Paradigm Shift in Patient Care from 1:15-2:45 pm in the Convention Center, Level 2, Hall E. Towards Precision Diagnostics and Therapeutics in Immune Mediated Diseases from 8:15-9:45 am in the Convention Center, Level 2, Hall E.
source: AAAI (American Academy of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology) Annual Meeting

text: Trained Immunity: Promises and Possibilities for Allergic Diseases from 8:15-9:45 am in the Convention Center, Level 2, Hall E. Multiomics in Asthma: Incredible Progress at Breakneck Speed from 9:30-11:00 am in the Convention Center, Level 2, Hall C.
source: AAAI (American Academy of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology) Annual Meeting

text: Announcing the 2026 Keynote Speaker, Andrea Califano, PhD Andrea Califano, PhD, will deliver the 2026 keynote presentation on Saturday, February 28 from 3:30-4:30 pm in the Convention Center, Level 2, Hall E. He is the Clyde and Helen Wu Professor of Chemical and Systems Biology at Columbia University Irving Medical Center.
source: AAAI (American Academy of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology) Annual Meeting

text: In October 2023, he took on a new role as the President of the Chan Zuckerberg Biohub New York. The Califano Lab uses a combination of computational and experimental methodologies to reconstruct the regulatory logic of human cells in a genome-wide fashion to identify master regulator proteins responsible for human disease, including cancer and neurodegenerative syndromes.
source: AAAI (American Academy of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology) Annual Meeting

text: This has resulted in several clinical trials, including an innovative N-of-1 study for precision cancer medicine. Dr. Califano is also Co-founder of DarwinHealth Inc.
source: AAAI (American Academy of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology) Annual Meeting

text: Participate in Highly Interactive Educational Sessions Get an interactive experience at the 2026 AAAAI Annual Meeting by attending one of the many workshop sessions! All workshops include one or more interactive components, such as hands-on skill activities, small group discussions, audience response technology and more.
source: AAAI (American Academy of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology) Annual Meeting

text: Discover New Innovative Research in the Field The 2026 AAAAI Annual Meeting will feature groundbreaking research presentations from renowned experts and junior investigators from across the globe.
source: AAAI (American Academy of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology) Annual Meeting

text: Stop by the Poster Hall during the Poster Sessions, when abstract authors will be available to discuss their work and answer questions and make some time for oral abstract sessions held over the course of the Annual Meeting.
source: AAAI (American Academy of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology) Annual Meeting

text: Attend Transformative Education Sessions and Groundbreaking Research Presentations Join us at the premier event in allergy / immunology for transformative education sessions, groundbreaking research presentations and practical takeaways to help you thrive in your practice and provide optimal care to your patients.
source: AAAI (American Academy of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology) Annual Meeting

text: There’s something for everyone at the 2026 AAAAI Annual Meeting! Get the 2026 AAAAI Annual Meeting Program with the tap of a finger! Download the 2026 AAAAI Annual Meeting app and improve your meeting experience. • Easily locate session handouts, abstracts and evaluations. • Research speakers and add their sessions to your calendar. • Learn about last minute program changes.
source: AAAI (American Academy of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology) Annual Meeting

text: Join us in celebrating and supporting research by attending the AAAAI Foundation events in Philadelphia, PA. The Annual Benefit will be held on Saturday, February 28 and the 14th Anniversary Run/Walk Celebration is Sunday, March 1. Important Update: The 2026 Annual Benefit is sold out. Please reach out to to be added to our wait list.
source: AAAI (American Academy of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology) Annual Meeting

text: Thank you for your interest! On Saturday, February 28 at the Loews Philadelphia Hotel, we will have an evening celebrating the 2026 AAAAI Foundation Research Award recipients. Enjoy delicious food, beverages and entertainment. Cocktail attire is appropriate.
source: AAAI (American Academy of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology) Annual Meeting

text: AAAAI Foundation 14th Anniversary Run/Walk Celebration and Virtual Run/Walk For a $25 registration fee, you can participate in one or both of the following: Keep fit before the Annual Meeting by participating in this year’s Virtual Run/Walk as an individual or team.
source: AAAI (American Academy of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology) Annual Meeting

text: Once registered, stay tuned for an activation link allowing you to start tracking those steps! The AAAAI Foundation's Run/Walk Celebration will be held on Sunday, March 1 from 5:30-6:30 pm at the Convention Center, Level 1, Hall G. As part of this year’s event, we’ll celebrate 14 years of the Run/Walk with food, music, awards, networking opportunities and a photo slideshow.
source: AAAI (American Academy of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology) Annual Meeting

text: Visit us at the AAAAI Foundation booth in the Convention Center, Level 1, Broad Street Atrium. Purchase Friend of President and NAIA ribbons, learn about this year’s Foundation events, awards and ways to support allergy/immunology. This site uses cookies.
